_meta.description: Search index chunks for portfolio site. Source of truth for test-llm.html search.

chunks.title: About John Hanacek
chunks.tags: innovator designer creator AI human augmentation founding designer design engineer
chunks.content: John Hanacek works at the intersection of Creativity, Curiosity, AI & Human Augmentation. Founding Designer & Design Engineer building AI-native products, spatial computing interfaces, and agentic systems.

chunks.title: Contact & Social
chunks.tags: contact email linkedin bluesky twitter social
chunks.content: Email: hi@johnhanacek.com. Social: Bluesky @johnhanacek.bsky.social, LinkedIn linkedin.com/in/johnhanacek, X/Twitter @johnhanacek.

chunks.title: MetaMedium — AI Beyond Chat
chunks.tags: metamedium AI diagrammatic communication framework whitepaper
chunks.content: MetaMedium: A framework for diagrammatic human-AI communication. Dynamic tools that adapt to thought, moving beyond chat-based AI interfaces.

chunks.title: JH Design LLC — Client Work
chunks.tags: consulting UX product design services freelance workshops
chunks.content: JH Design LLC (est. 2016) offers founding designer services for startups and R&D teams. Current clients include Muse.bio (workshop facilitation, user personas) and stealth projects (MVP design, demo support).

chunks.title: Nanome — XR Molecular Design
chunks.tags: nanome XR VR molecular product design spatial computing unity
chunks.content: XR Product & Interaction Designer at Nanome Inc. (2022-2024). Primary XR Spatial Computing designer: 3D UX prototyping in Unity, ShapesXR, Blender. Product design, conversational AI interface design, UX research.

chunks.title: BadVR — Immersive Data Visualization
chunks.tags: badvr XR VR AR data visualization immersive analytics hololens quest
chunks.content: Immersive UI/UX Designer at BadVR (2021-2022). Interaction and UX design for Meta Quest & HoloLens 2 with hand tracking focus. AR HUD sensor data visualization prototypes.

chunks.title: AvatarMEDIC — Telepresence & Robotics
chunks.tags: avatarmedic telepresence robotics medical XR startup CEO founder
chunks.content: Founding CEO of AvatarMEDIC (2019-2021). Telepresence enabling remote medical training and robotic surgery collaboration. Projects: HoloTRIAGE, A1R Augmented First Responder, Robot Digital Twin Control. Founder Institute SF 2020 graduate.

chunks.title: HoloTRIAGE — Medical XR Training
chunks.tags: holotriage medical XR hololens triage healthcare AR training
chunks.content: HoloTRIAGE: HoloLens 2 medical training system. Microsoft Reactor Hackathon Winner (2020). Holographic interface for medical assessment and decision support.

chunks.title: Robot Digital Twin Control
chunks.tags: robotics digital twin XR control remote aerospace
chunks.content: XR-based robot arm control via digital twin technology. Won R&D Innovation Award from Aerospace Medical Association (2022) for programming robot arm via XR digital twin.

chunks.title: Skills & Tools
chunks.tags: skills tools figma unity blender claude code prototyping shapesxr obsidian
chunks.content: Tools: Claude Code, OpenCode, LMStudio, Figma, Adobe Suite, Blender, Unity, ShapesXR, Obsidian, Coda. Expertise: Product Design, XR/VR Interface Design, AI-Powered Tools, Data Visualization, Design Systems.

chunks.title: Earth Star — Worldbuilding
chunks.tags: earth star worldbuilding speculative regenerative futures AI wisdom
chunks.content: Earth Star: A New Old Way. Positive vision for the future grounded in wisdom of tradition and technology realities. Autonomous creativity & research system. Original painting by John Hanacek, 2025.

chunks.title: Interactive Installations — Godish & God Like
chunks.tags: art installation interactive leap motion kinect godish
chunks.content: Godish (2015): Leap Motion controller triggering lightning video on hand hover. God Like (2016): Microsoft Kinect full-body pose version, collaboration with Nathan Danskey.

chunks.title: Influence — Audiovisual Installation
chunks.tags: influence installation meditation processing p5js georgetown
chunks.content: Influence (2016): Georgetown Media Fest installation. Audiovisual meditation on light and sound. Made with Processing, rewritten in p5.js. Available online at jhana.zone.

chunks.title: Fractal Futures — Science Fiction
chunks.tags: writing fiction science fiction stories worldbuilding substack
chunks.content: Fractal Futures: Original science fiction storytelling. Thoughtful ruminations on bright and dark possibilities ahead. Available on Substack, Gumroad, and Amazon Kindle.

chunks.title: Photography & Multimedia Art
chunks.tags: photography landscape portrait editorial multimedia 3d scanning
chunks.content: Multimedia artist working in interactive installation, VR/AR, digital illustration, 3D scanning and modeling, animation and rendering. Background in photography: editorial, portrait, landscape.

chunks.title: JH Coaching OS — AI Coaching
chunks.tags: coaching AI training workshops founders executives learning
chunks.content: JH Coaching OS: A living, adaptive AI coaching system that learns your business. Personalized AI agent, materials, context docs, and dashboard. Private workspace with live sessions.

chunks.title: Coaching Engagement Options
chunks.tags: coaching packages retainer sprint audit consulting
chunks.content: Guided Coaching (4 sessions/2 months), Embedded Retainer (weekly/biweekly ongoing), Build Sprint (1-2 week intensive), Audit (one-session deep dive). From zero to building with AI.

chunks.title: Design & Product Services
chunks.tags: services design product workshops research strategy
chunks.content: Workshop Facilitation (user journey mapping, personas, design thinking). User Research. Strategy & Vision. Deep product work: 0→1 Product Design, Design Engineering, AI Product Integration, Design Systems Architecture.

chunks.title: Education — Georgetown CCT
chunks.tags: education masters thesis research georgetown
chunks.content: MA in Communication, Culture & Technology from Georgetown University (2014-2016). Dual theses on AI-powered conversational interfaces and political/social implications of technology standardization. Awarded 'Most Meta' by peers.

chunks.title: Education — UC San Diego
chunks.tags: education bachelors ucsd political science
chunks.content: BA in Political Science / International Relations from UC San Diego (2008-2012). Thesis on remotely piloted aircraft in context of just war theory with discussion of ground robotics deployment.

chunks.title: Awards & Recognition
chunks.tags: awards innovation aerospace nist microsoft founder institute
chunks.content: R&D Innovation Award (2022, Aerospace Medical Association). NIST CHARIoT Challenge Phase 2 Winner (2021). Founder Institute Graduate (2020). Microsoft Reactor Hackathon Winner (2020). 'Most Meta' Award (2016, Georgetown CCT).

chunks.title: Areas of Expertise
chunks.tags: expertise skills AI XR robotics design product LLM agent
chunks.content: Design & Product: User Research, 3D Interaction Design, Product Design, Design Systems. AI & Development: LLM Integration, Agent Orchestration, Intelligence Augmentation, Conversational UX. Physical/Virtual: Robot Control, Digital Twins, 3D Scanning, XR/Spatial Computing.

chunks.title: Work History Overview
chunks.tags: career work history nanome badvr avatarmedic jh design collaborate georgetown
chunks.content: Nanome Inc. (2022-24), BadVR (2021-22), AvatarMEDIC CEO (2019-21), JH Design LLC (2016-present), Collaborate.org (2015-18), Georgetown CNDLS (2014-15), Qualcomm Institute photographer (2010-12), Ocean Lifeguard (2007-11).

chunks.title: Research & Publications
chunks.tags: research publications thesis edulearn atlantic council kevin kelly huffpost
chunks.content: Masters Thesis: Art Math, Math Art. EduLearn 2015 Barcelona: Technology adoption research. Atlantic Council: Internet as Answer Engine (predicted ChatGPT-style systems). Kevin Kelly's Technium: Haiku. HuffPost: Beyond Network Feudalism.
